cedict_en: to put up/to build (scaffolding)/to hang (clothes on a pole)/to connect/to join/to arrange in pairs/to match/to add/to throw in (resources)/to take (boat, train

to file a lawsuit/to sue/to dispute
to hit/to strike/to attack/to crack down on sth/blow/(psychological) shock/percussion (music)
